Title: KSB stock climbs to 8-week high, logging 12% intraday gain. Why is this small-cap rising in a range-bound market?
Summary: KSB shares surged 12% to  ₹803.85 on February 26, reaching an eight-week high. The rise follows a solid fiscal Q4 report, with net profit increasing 10.8% YoY. The stock has gained 12.3% in February,
